title: CashflowRecord
description: Container for all cashflow data: sources, line items, debt service, liquidity buckets, and runway snapshots. Stored at cashflow/cashflow.json and updated monthly.

CashFlowSource.title: CashFlowSource
CashFlowSource.description: A recurring or one-time source (or sink) of cash. Used as a foreign key from CashFlowItem.

type.description: Category of this cash source/sink. Income types (rental, dividend, etc.) produce positive CashFlowItems. Expense types (debt-service, capex, operating-expense) produce negative items.

deal_ref.description: Relative path to the deal.json this source is linked to. Null for family-office-level sources (e.g., operating expenses).

active.description: Whether this source is currently generating cashflow. Set to false when a deal is exited or a loan is paid off.

expected_monthly_usd.description: Expected monthly amount in USD. Positive for inflows, negative for outflows. Used for runway projections.

CashFlowItem.title: CashFlowItem
CashFlowItem.description: A single cash event for a specific period. Immutable once created.

amount_usd.description: Cash amount in USD. Positive = inflow (money received). Negative = outflow (money paid out).

accrual_date.description: Date the cash was actually received or paid. May differ from period if cross-month.

examples: Q2 2026 dividend: 1500 shares @ $2.50/sh, CA state withholding applied

file_hash.description: Hash of the source document (bank statement, distribution notice) if applicable.

DebtService.title: DebtService
DebtService.description: A single loan, mortgage, line of credit, or other debt obligation.

deal_ref.description: Relative path to the associated deal.json.

rate.description: Annual interest rate as a decimal. Example: 0.0625 = 6.25%.

rate_type.description: Whether the rate changes over time.

index_rate.description: If rate_type = variable or floating, the benchmark index.

payment_usd.description: Monthly principal + interest payment in USD.

maturity_date.description: Date the loan matures / comes due.

dscr.description: Debt Service Coverage Ratio = NOI / Annual Debt Service. Calculated and updated by cashflow_snapshot.py. Alert if < 1.25.

ltv_pct.description: Loan-to-value percentage based on most recent appraisal.

examples: Interest-only first 2 years, then P&I. Balloon payment at maturity.

LiquidityBucket.title: LiquidityBucket
LiquidityBucket.description: A named pool of liquid cash. The three buckets represent the barbell Layer 1 structure.

name.description: operating = day-to-day expenses; reserve = 3–6 month emergency buffer; deployment = earmarked for next investment.

as_of_date.description: Date this balance was last confirmed.

apy_pct.description: Annual percentage yield on this account. Tracked to optimize idle cash.

examples: Main operating account — covers payroll, vendors, professional services

RunwaySnapshot.title: RunwaySnapshot
RunwaySnapshot.description: Point-in-time snapshot of total liquidity vs. burn rate. Written monthly by cashflow_snapshot.py.

monthly_burn_usd.description: Average monthly net cash outflow, calculated as 6-month rolling average of negative net cashflow months.

runway_months.description: total_liquid_usd / monthly_burn_usd. The most important single number in this module.

bucket_breakdown.description: Snapshot of each bucket balance at this point in time.

monthly_inflows_usd.description: Total cash inflows for the period ending as_of_date.

monthly_outflows_usd.description: Total cash outflows for the period ending as_of_date (positive number).

net_monthly_cashflow_usd.description: monthly_inflows_usd minus monthly_outflows_usd. Negative = net burn.

alert_triggered.description: True if any alert rule fired during this snapshot calculation.

alert_type.description: Which alert rule fired. Null if alert_triggered = false.

examples: Deployment bucket will be used for Meridian commitment in July — adjust runway projection

sources.description: All active and historical CashFlowSource records.

items.description: All CashFlowItem records. Immutable — new periods add new items; old items are never edited.

debt_service.description: All active and historical debt instruments.

liquidity_buckets.description: Current state of each liquidity bucket. Updated monthly.

runway_snapshots.description: Historical runway snapshots. Each month appends a new record. Also written individually to cashflow/runway_snapshots/runway_{YYYY-MM-DD}.json.
